summary: Phase 9 Final Validation COMPLETE. Comprehensive smoke test of all admin and member journeys passed. All major pages load correctly, navigation works, and features are functional.

issues: HTML hydration warnings: <span> inside <tbody>/<select>/<option> - cosmetic only, caused by React wrapper spans. Does not affect functionality.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Final validation complete. All features working. Ready for deployment.

login.details: Admin login with shannonnieman1030@gmail.com works, redirects to /dashboard

dashboard.details: Dashboard loads with stats: 22K members, 15K active, $220K MTD giving, $2.4M YTD, charts visible

solomonpay_dashboard.details: SolomonPay dashboard shows DonorIQ, Virtual Terminal button, QR Codes, giving trend chart, recent transactions

solomonpay_transactions.details: Transactions tab shows list with search, refund buttons visible

solomonpay_payouts.details: Payouts tab shows balance, payout buttons, history

solomonpay_funds.details: Funds tab shows fund cards (General, Building, Missions, etc.)

solomonpay_statements.details: Statements tab shows year selector, generate statements button

kids_checkin.details: Kids Check-in Station loads with 6 currently checked in children, Manual Check-In and Register New Family buttons

courses.details: Solomon Academy shows 6+ courses: Becoming a Member, Why We Give, What is Baptism, Premarital Counseling, Food Pantry, First-Time Volunteers

printers.details: Printer Configuration page loads with Add Printer button, shows supported printers (Zebra ZD/GK, Brother QL, Dymo LabelWriter)

login.details: Member login with member@abundant.church works, redirects to /portal

portal_home.details: Portal home loads with greeting, onboarding modal (3-step) appears for new users

portal_groups.details: Groups page shows MY GROUPS (Saturday Service Team, Parents of Teens, Friday Young Professionals) with Chat/Leave buttons, DISCOVER MORE GROUPS with Get Notified buttons, View Details & Q&A links

portal_give.details: Give page shows amount buttons ($25-$250), Fund dropdown, Frequency dropdown, 5 saved payment cards, Download Tax Statement button, Give with SolomonPay button

portal_me.details: Me page shows Maria Garcia profile with tabs: Overview, My Giving, Payment Methods, My Groups, Communications. Shows engagement stats (7/7 Sundays, 14mo giving streak, 3 active groups)

portal_watch.details: Watch page shows 'WE ARE ABUNDANT 2026' sermon with Pastor James, Watch Now/My List/Share buttons, Popular Series section, category filters (Faith, Family, Leadership, Worship, Growth, Community)

portal_events.details: Events page shows upcoming events (Abundant Event 17-22) with Register/View Details buttons, event filters (All Events, Worship, Women, Men, Youth, Community, Conferences)

mocked_apis.payout_processing: MOCKED - creates records but doesn't process actual Stripe payouts

deployment_readiness.notes: All admin and member journeys verified. No critical issues found. Minor hydration warnings are cosmetic only.
